h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will perform the test and expect the tutor to make the final sign-off decision based on the results.
The learner will continue to struggle with the relationship between side length and area in a doubled square.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence:
Then the doubled side is out.

Now the grid has a different line to test.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor abandons the doubled-side approach in response to the learner's realization that they do not know the construction for a side of area two, shifting the representation to the diagonal.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, so there is no revised framing for the tutor to adapt to.
